assignments.title: Introduction to Algebra
assignments.description: Solve the following algebraic equations and show all working steps. Cover linear equations, quadratic formula, and factorization.

assignments.title: World War II Essay
assignments.description: Write a 500-word essay analyzing the key causes and consequences of World War II, focusing on political, economic, and social factors.

assignments.title: Photosynthesis Lab Report
assignments.description: Document your observations from the photosynthesis experiment. Include hypothesis, materials, procedure, results and conclusion.

submissions.answer: Photosynthesis is the process by which plants use sunlight, water, and carbon dioxide to produce oxygen and energy in the form of sugar. My experiment confirmed that plants exposed to more light produced more oxygen bubbles per minute.
